title: Jamaican Hash Browns
description: A delicious twist on traditional hash browns, infused with the flavors of Jamaica. These crispy shredded potatoes are perfect as a side dish or a snack.
instructions: Grate the potatoes using a box grater or a food processor.
Squeeze out as much moisture from the grated potatoes as possible using a clean kitchen towel or cheesecloth.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, tender Jamaican seasoning, and Jamaican hash seasoning. Mix well to combine.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the potato mixture to the skillet and press down to form a flat layer.
Cook for 4-5 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the hash browns over and cook for an additional 4-5 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Transfer the hash browns to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the hash browns from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Jamaican hash browns hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
